message:
fix(store,command): fix keyspace event flag validation and DEBUG SLEEP panic guard

- keyspace_events_parse: disable all flags when K/E not specified (Redis
  behavior — without K or E, no delivery channel exists)
- DEBUG SLEEP: add is_finite() guard to prevent panic from
  Duration::from_secs_f64(inf)
- Remove unused decode_db_key import in test module

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
